sea.note: SEA data still to pull from team — once received, add a 'sea' block here mirroring the linkedin_horizontal structure and the dashboard will surface it automatically.

read_of_the_week: Horizontal LinkedIn (rightshoring) is buying real attention from CEOs and Customer Service Managers — CSM CTR is 2.5%, ~2× the campaign average — and is reaching the right account list (NHS, DWP, Lloyds, Aviva, Monzo, Vodafone). Verticalised Influ2 is doing the second job: BFS is converting reach into rich engagement at Nationwide, OSB and Goldman; T&H has easyJet lit up across 4 contacts inside one buying group. Next: pull the SEA layer to close the picture.
